prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "14. Principal Accountant Fees and Services" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules".
Find where Item 14 ends: right before the "Item 15" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 14 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
All Other Fees. We did not pay Ernst & Young, LLP, or WWC, P.C., for other services for the years ended December 31, 2022 and 2021.

Pre-Approval Policy
Our audit committee was formed upon the consummation of our initial public offering. As a result, the audit committee did not pre-approve all of the
foregoing services, although any services rendered prior to the formation of our audit committee were approved by our board of directors. Since the
formation of our audit committee, and on a going-forward basis, the audit committee has been and will pre-approve all auditing services and permitted
non-audit services to be performed by us for our auditors, the auditing fees and terms thereof (subject to the de minimis exceptions for non-audit
services described in for Exchange Act) which are approved by the audit committee prior to the commencement of the audits.
